title: Public functions in routing/router.py missing return type annotations
description:
Six public methods in `src/lichen/routing/router.py` are missing return type annotations:

- Line 183: `Router.route()` - returns `tuple[RouteDecision, IPv6Address | None]`
- Line 388: `Router.on_route_discovered()` - returns `list[PendingPacket]`
- Line 405: `Router.update_neighbor_coords()` - returns `None`
- Line 411: `Router.update_neighbor_queue_depth()` - returns `None`
- Line 423: `Router.dtn_buffer_message()` - returns `bool`
- Line 500: `Router.gpsr_forward()` - missing return type
